companies.name: AISLab GmbH
companies.shortDescription:
AISLab GmbH. # AISLab GmbH

AISLab GmbH is a IT Services and IT Consulting company. AISLab GmbH is a modern-driven service provider in the field of industrial software development, SPS and robot programming, as well as image processing. They offer specialized training in these technological fields and aim to optimize production processes and digitalize business processes. They provide customized solutions that optimize production processes and digitalize business processes. Founded in 2017. Headquartered in Mannheim, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

## About
Die AISLab GmbH ist ein zukunftsorientiertes Unternehmen für industrielle Softwareentwicklung und Automatisierung. Wir bieten maßgeschneiderte Lösungen mit Fokus auf Effizienz, Qualität und Innovation – von SPS- und Roboterprogrammierung über Anlagenautomatisierung bis hin zur MES- und ERP-Integration.

Dank unserer langjährigen Erfahrung garantieren wir schnelle, kompetente und lösungsorientierte Projektumsetzung. Wir integrieren bewährte Softwaretools und Hardwarestandards nahtlos in bestehende Systeme – für nachhaltige, transparente und zukunftssichere Lösungen.

Unser Leistungsspektrum:
- Anlagen- und Prozessautomatisierung
- Roboter- und SPS-Programmierung
- Individuelle Softwarelösungen
- MES-/ERP-Integration und Systemmigration
- Industrielle Bildverarbeitungssysteme

Weiterbildung & Know-how-Transfer:
Neben technischen

companies.name: Ingenieurbüro Guttenberger
companies.shortDescription:
Ingenieurbüro Guttenberger. # Ingenieurbüro Guttenberger

Ingenieurbüro Guttenberger is a Software Development company. The company is an engineering office specializing in software development and automation. They offer a wide range of services including software development, automation systems, automation systems, visualization systems, application development, and laser adaptations. They have a global presence with production and production processes. They also provide customer and project-based training in German or English. Ingenieurbüro Guttenberger employs 3 people (+33.3% YoY, +1 person), founded in 2009. Headquartered in Germany.

## About
Als Ingenieurbüro für Automatisierungstechnik aus Schmidmühlen unterstützen wir seit 01/2009 unsere Kunden bei der Umsetzung anspruchsvoller Projekte – von der SPS-Programmierung bis zur weltweiten Inbetriebnahme.
Mit unserem Team aus acht erfahrenen Programmierern realisieren wir Lösungen effizient, praxisnah und zuverlässig. Jeder im Team bringt spezifisches Know-how und umfangreiche Projekterfahrung mit – eine Stärke, die wir gezielt für individuelle Kundenanforderungen einsetzen.
Wir arbeiten mit unterschiedlichsten Systemen und Technologien und passen unsere Leistungen flexibel an jedes Projekt an. Dabei stehen Qualität, Effizienz und eine enge Abstimmung mit unseren Kunden stets im Mittelpunkt.

Eine partnerschaftliche Zusammen

companies.name: Australian Machine Vision
companies.shortDescription:
Australian Machine Vision. # Australian Machine Vision

Australian Machine Vision is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. Australian Machine Vision is an industry leader in vision system integration. They have deployed systems nationwide to Australia’s leading industrial and manufacturing corporations. They aim to apply the latest vision system technology, customise the system to suit the end user, provide the best price/performance solution, and provide vision system support. Australian Machine Vision employs 7 people (+100.0% YoY, +6 people), founded in 2005. Headquartered in Seaford, Victoria, Australia.

## About
Australian Machine Vision has partners, provided custom inspection, process control, and robot guidance solutions to Australian businesses for over 17 years.

We have successfully applied “area scan” “line scan” “laser triangulation” and “time-of-flight” technologies across a broad range of product types and environments, covering food & beverage, pharmaceutical, packaging, and industrial applications.

## Company Details

companies.shortDescription:
IUNA AI. IUNA AI is a Industrial Automation company. IUNA AI offers AI-based machine vision systems and image processing software for an autonomy product and surface inspection. IUNA AI employs 2 people (+100.0% YoY, +2 people), founded in 2019. Headquartered in Untergruppenbach, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.
[...]
IUNA AI develops advanced deep learning-based camera systems and image processing software to take quality assurance in industrial manufacturing to the next level. Founded in 2020 and headquartered in Heilbronn, Germany, we specialize in automating the inspection of complex production processes. Our AI-powered solutions enable manufacturers to achieve higher accuracy, speed, and consistency in quality checks, ensuring product standards while reducing costs and human error.
[...]
Through cutting-edge technology and deep industry insights, IUNA AI drives efficiency and precision in areas such as MIG/MAG weld seam inspection and defect detection in metallic products, setting a new benchmark in automated quality assurance. Our goal is to empower industries with intelligent systems that improve productivity and uphold the highest standards of quality.
